suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add library entry documenting that cogent database schema requirements can be found in /Users/wiz/cogent/internal/store/store.go, including table definitions, migration logic, and position backfill algorithms. This knowledge could help future workers performing schema compatibility work with the cogent runtime.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature migrate-repo-cogent-db-for-serve-compatibility: Worker spent considerable effort reverse-engineering the schema by exploring the cogent source with multiple Grep operations (searching for 'position', 'attestation_records', 'attestation_frozen_at', 'signer_pubkey') and Read operations on store.go at various offsets to understand column requirements and migration approach.
